# Aryan Panwar — Product Evidence Book

> An aspiring Product Manager's portfolio written as an evidence book: flagship case studies (FitWardrobe, Mithivoices, SEO-GEO Optimizer), product thinking grounded in real projects, essays on AI product management, and career journey by Aryan Panwar.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, featured case study, and the Product Evidence Book map.
- [Case Studies](/case-studies): Flagship and supporting product case studies — problem, users, tradeoffs, metrics.
- [My Product Thinking](/thinking): PM frameworks (JTBD, RICE, opportunity trees, north-star) applied to real projects.
- [Writing](/writing): Essays on positioning AI products, scoping LLM features, and building for agentic users.
- [Journey](/journey): Career timeline from ECE student to aspiring PM.
- [About](/about): Short introduction, values, and range.
- [Resume](/resume): Experience, projects, publications, and education.
- [FAQ](/faq): Quick answers for recruiters about roles, resumes, projects, and how to get in touch.
- [Skills & Certifications](/skills): Technical skills, PM toolkit, and verified certifications.
- [Contact](/contact): Email and social links.

## Examples

- [FitWardrobe case study](/case-studies/fitwardrobe): AI wardrobe stylist — vision-first PM case study.
- [Mithivoices case study](/case-studies/mithivoices): OSS real-time voice AI stack.
- [SEO-GEO Optimizer case study](/case-studies/seo-geo-optimizer): npm package for making sites legible to AI answer engines.
- [JTBD applied to FitWardrobe](/thinking/jtbd-fitwardrobe): How Jobs-to-be-Done reframed the product.
- [Positioning AI Products for Discovery](/writing/positioning-ai-products-for-discovery): PM playbook for GEO.
